mode_rationale: Pipeline healthy (Mode 1/2 green). Previous report had 4 unresolved findings: expansion tracker discrepancy, PROP-001/002 effectiveness unknown, PROP-003 unresolved, social overrun. All needed investigation before more cost engineering.

modes_checked.mode_2_infrastructure: GREEN — FUSE matches GitHub on all 5 checked files (wins.json, sections.json, digest-reviews.js, generate-html.js, index.html).

modes_checked.mode_4_proposals: SELECTED — 4 unresolved findings from previous report. All investigated this run.

previous_followup.evidence: The decider uses an 'integrated: boolean' field on each tracker item, NOT a status change to 'integrated'. 35/36 complete items have integrated: true. Only EXP-040 (newest, written today) lacks the field — pending next decider run. The previous report checked for status==='integrated' which doesn't exist. The decider prompt at line 59 correctly filters on '!i.integrated'. No bug here.

previous_followup.finding: PROP-001/002 marked implemented but analyst (436 lines) and decider (453 lines) unchanged
previous_followup.status: FIXED — PREVIOUS REPORT WAS WRONG (FUSE staleness)
previous_followup.evidence: Current line counts: analyst.md = 110 lines (was 436 → 75% reduction), decider.md = 82 lines (was 453 → 82% reduction). Both now have reference modules in monitor/prompts/reference/: analyst has 5 modules (analyst-infrastructure.md, analyst-mode0-onboarding.md, analyst-mode1-expansions.md, analyst-mode34-procedures.md, analyst-normal-analysis.md), decider has 4 modules (decider-curmudgeon.md, decider-intake.md, decider-patches-and-selfapply.md, decider-reporting.md). PROPs were fully implemented. The 'unchanged' finding in the previous report was caused by FUSE serving stale file content — the workspace mount hadn't been synced.

previous_followup.finding: PROP-003 digest bug (lines 147-148 processedWinIds legacy fallback)
previous_followup.evidence: Lines 147-148 of build-scripts/digest-reviews.js still contain the legacy fallback. Lines 50-53 still construct processedWinIds. The comment at lines 143-145 still describes the bug. PROP-003 exists with status 'proposed'. Cannot self-fix per Mode 4 rules (build-scripts/ changes need a build cycle). 8th consecutive escalation. Current impact: low (pending digest = 0, curmudgeon at 65/69 Cycle 2). Future impact: will mask Cycle 3 reviews for already-processed WIN IDs.

previous_followup.finding: Social agent ran 4 times on daily schedule, run 4 was explicit no-op
previous_followup.evidence: monitor/social/ has 4 reports today (report-2026-04-08.json, run3, run4, plus search-rankings update). Run 4 status='quiet', notes='QUIET RUN. No new developments since run 3.' The social agent correctly self-identified the no-op but still consumed a full Sonnet invocation to reach that conclusion.

previous_followup.finding: Future-dated patches file (suggested-patches-2026-04-09T10-01.json created on April 8)
previous_followup.evidence: File still exists. Cosmetic timezone offset issue. Low priority.

findings.description: Previous tinker report contained two false findings due to FUSE staleness: (1) expansion tracker 'discrepancy' was actually correct behavior (boolean field vs status), (2) PROP-001/002 'unchanged' was stale file reads. Tinker itself is vulnerable to FUSE staleness despite the CLAUDE.md warning.
findings.evidence: Report 2026-04-08T20:30Z claimed '35 complete and 0 integrated' and 'line counts unchanged (436 and 453)'. Both were wrong. Fresh reads show integrated=true on 35/36 items and 110/82 line counts.

suggested_fix.description: Tinker Mode 3 cost engineering should verify line counts via GitHub raw URL, not workspace FUSE mount, when auditing prompt sizes. Add a curl-based check to the cost engineering reference module.
suggested_fix.rationale: Requires edit to tinker-cost-engineering.md reference module (which is in monitor/prompts/reference/, technically editable, but the fix is architectural rather than mechanical).

findings.description: PROP-003 (digest-reviews.js legacy fallback bug) now at 8th escalation. Tinker cannot self-fix build-scripts/. Needs human or decider intervention.
findings.evidence: Lines 147-148 in build-scripts/digest-reviews.js. PROP-003 written with full fix specification. The fix is 2 lines: replace line 147-148 with 'const isProcessed = processedSet.has(file);' and remove lines 50-53 (processedWinIds construction).

suggested_fix.description: Human or build-capable agent applies PROP-003. The fix is trivial and low-risk.

findings.description: Social agent ran 4 times today (schedule says daily). Run 4 was pure waste. A pre-flight gate checking dome site commit timestamps could skip unnecessary runs.
findings.evidence: 4 reports in monitor/social/ today. Run 4: status='quiet', self-identified as no-op. Estimated cost: one full Sonnet invocation (~$0.05-0.10) for zero value.

suggested_fix.description: Add early-exit check to social prompt: if no new dome commits since last social run AND no new GitHub issues, output a one-line 'no changes' and exit. Or reduce to strict daily-only scheduling.
suggested_fix.rationale: Schedule frequency change requires human approval per Mode 4 rules.

open_issue_health.note: Down from 6 in previous report. Decider actively closing issues.

dispatcher_conversion_results.tinker: VALIDATED — 100 lines core + 4 modules (~22KB total). One module loads per run. Working correctly.
dispatcher_conversion_results.analyst: VALIDATED — 110 lines core + 5 modules (~27KB total). Dramatic reduction from 436 lines. PROP-001 confirmed effective.
dispatcher_conversion_results.decider: VALIDATED — 82 lines core + 4 modules (~25KB total). Dramatic reduction from 453 lines. PROP-002 confirmed effective.
dispatcher_conversion_results.total_context_savings: Analyst saves ~326 lines/run, decider saves ~371 lines/run, tinker saves ~400 lines/run. Combined: ~1097 lines of context freed across all three agents.

recommendations.description: Apply PROP-003 to fix digest-reviews.js legacy fallback bug (8th escalation). Two-line fix, low risk, full spec in PROP-003.
Add FUSE staleness protection to tinker cost engineering: verify prompt line counts via GitHub raw URL, not workspace mount. Prevents false findings like this run discovered.
Investigate why social agent runs 4x on a daily schedule. Either enforce strict daily scheduling or add pre-flight gate.
